creator: kib@FreeBSD.org
text:
I the issue is indeed due to nss_ldap.so, then it must be reproducable on the 10.1 or stable/10 or head with the old nss_ldap.so shared object.

You should build debug versions of libc, libthr and ld-elf.so.1, install them, then enable nss_ldap.so in nssswitch.conf and obtain single core file.  Disable the nss_ldap.so, and obtain backtrace from the crashed program.
